title: Half-baked detector — fix false positives in test coverage and orphan checks
what_failed: check_tools_without_tests reported 17 warnings including false positives where test coverage existed in non-standard file names (test_stt.py covers tools_stt, test_web_router.py covers tools_web, test_voice_loop.py covers tools_wakeword). check_orphaned_tool_files reported 4 orphans that were legitimately imported in pi_agent.py and agent/voice_loop.py rather than agent/tools.py.
fix_applied: check_tools_without_tests: builds corpus of all testing/*.py content and checks whether the tool module stem appears anywhere in the corpus — not just in a specifically-named file. check_orphaned_tool_files: scans agent/tools.py + pi_agent.py + agent/voice_loop.py combined instead of agent/tools.py alone.
